seoTitle: Union County Public Schools Calendar 2027-2028: Dates, Holidays & PDF
seoDescription: View the Union County Public Schools 2027-2028 calendar with the first and last day, holidays, breaks, no-school dates, official PDF, and ICS download.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Union County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 23, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Union County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, June 7, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Break for Union County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs from Monday, December 20, 2027 through Monday, January 3, 2028. Students return after Winter Break on Tuesday, January 4, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring Break for Union County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs from Monday, April 17 through Friday, April 21, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Additional Student No-School Weekdays
yearNumbers.detail: Includes Labor Day, October 11 Staff Workday, Veterans Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, January 19 Staff Workday, February 21 Staff Workday, March 27 Staff Workday, Good Friday, and Memorial Day. Thanksgiving, Winter, and Spring Break weekdays are counted in the break ranges instead.

whatsNew.title: What's New for 2027-2028
content: The first day moves from August 24 in 2026-2027 to August 23 in 2027-2028.
The last day moves from June 4 in 2026-2027 to June 7 in 2027-2028.
Spring Break moves from March 29-April 2 in 2026-2027 to April 17-21 in 2027-2028.
Thanksgiving Break remains a three-weekday break in both traditional calendars.

calendarNotes: This page covers the UCPS Traditional Schools Academic Calendar. Staff-only labels are included only when they affect student attendance, and dates that fall inside a listed break are treated as part of that break rather than separate top-level student events.
